evals.expected_output: A structured audit report covering security (payment data handling, Stripe integration), concurrency (locking, race conditions), error handling (Stripe failures, broad rescues), performance, data integrity, and edge cases for a payment processing service.

A structured audit report covering security (constantize usage, authorization gaps), parameter handling (strong params, polymorphic type validation), state transitions, error handling, and controller design patterns.

A structured audit report covering data integrity (validations vs DB constraints, transactions), callbacks and side effects, state machine logic, dynamic method generation risks, edge cases in date validations, and testing coverage.
